headline: You're gaining when you should be losing—flip it today
summary: Your +0.05 kg/week gain must reverse starting now; today is the reset after weekend drift and requires zero snacking discipline plus 45 minutes of intention.
details: Eat exactly three measured Huel meals today and commit to zero snacking—no emotional eating, full stop. Rows for 45 minutes at moderate intensity on the machine this evening to establish the movement habit you need daily. Today matters because you're 0.71 kg/week behind target pace and every Monday sets the week's direction; you're moving away from your June 2027 goal and must reverse that trajectory immediately.
